{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7399112063822398232","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说采用的语言和文笔非常优美，读起来通顺流畅，令人愉悦。用词恰到好处，能够精准地表达出作者想要传达的情感。期待作者的下一部作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722744587,"group_id":"7379244151411313726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8pDW4S+z0TZvkEUTK1aW/WN0UVJSetrOQLU1QTvl8+j","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1077969927013838","user_name":"用户10779699"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1077969927013838","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7379244151411313726","book_info":{"abstract":"当原配遇到小三怎么办？关键的是，两人还意外互换了身体，连灵魂都互换了。
李曼梅委屈，“姐，都是汪有为引诱我。”
柳诗岚挑眉，“成为汪有为名正言顺的妻，不正是你朝思暮想的，这么好的机会摆在面前，怎么就不知道珍惜？”
汪有为，“老婆，求复合！！！”
柳诗岚，”从今以后，我的生活里只有孩子和父母，爱情和男人都给我滚的远远的。“
有人不乐意了，蹙眉，“我呢？！”
人生如戏，戏如人生。换个角度描写婚姻、家庭和生活，啼笑皆非中体验人性。请勿较真、勿对号入座！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o21a796484566ad564ea990ba948e40f0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"沐红坪","author_id":"","book_id":"7379244151411313726","book_name":"哎呀，和绿茶灵魂互换了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7379426843557904958","read_count":"86","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"140832"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o21a796484566ad564ea990ba948e40f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181795&x-signature=JG%2FLWTFzkJhCa46iPdBQdhGWFYo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4007086333635726","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2505,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1138},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405136690847056665","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错的，读起来很流畅，角色性格鲜明
